calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Continued To Jul-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses And Compliance To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jodie Steinberg, Esq.; Statement Of Questions And Answers In Dispute; Statement Of Items In Dispute
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jodie Steinberg, Esq. of Hann Law Firm, T:408.755.9793, for defendants and moving party;
Gregory E. Rolando, T:714.336.1562, plaintiff and opposing party appearing on his own behalf by Court Call.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative rulng with some modifications. DEFENDANTS TRACY LEE, RAYMOND GIRON, and PEARL SPA & SAUNA's Motion To Compel Further Responses And Compliance To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions is granted in part, denied in part. [See signed order for the court's complete ruling.]

ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREGORY ROLANDO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment is denied. The Unruh Act only prohibits unreasonable, invidious, or arbitrary discrimination; and there is no violation where the disparate treatment furthers a socially beneficial policy. (Javorsky v. W. Athletic Clubs, Inc. (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 1386, 1394.) Here, there is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether the denial of male patrons is arbitrary discrimination under the Unruh Act or reasonable in light of privacy concerns or other legitimate business interests.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Andrew Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AC)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
